info.english_meaning: to go to move to kill to be angry to cause pain
info.hindI_arTa: jAnA calanAmAranA duHKa denA kroDa karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: asya sew-tvam iti tattvaboDinIkA kAramatam iti jYAyate  nyAsakArAdayaH aniw tvaM manyate  vistarastu kfdantarUpamAlAyAM drazwavyaH  rezaRaM = hiMsA  ' gatirozaRayoH ' iti kutracit dfzwaH pAWaH  rezaRaSabdasya vfkaSabdArTattvAt kvacideva neyamiti puruzakAraH  ' ravate rOti Sabdane ' (Slo. 23) iti devaH

participles.neuter: rorUyAmbaBUvat, rorUyAmbaBUvad, rorUyAmAsivat, rorUyAmAsivad, rorUyAYcakfvat, rorUyAYcakfvad
